answer:
Otter.ai does not offer self-serve developer API access. The Otter.ai public API is restricted to Enterprise plan workspaces [1][2]. It is not available on the free Basic tier or individual Pro/Business subscriptions [3][4].

To access the API, organizations must typically have an Enterprise contract, which requires contacting their sales team for custom pricing and setup [1][5]. Once an Enterprise account is active, you can manage API keys through the Developer tab in your account integration settings [1][2].
